testcase.name: test_health_endpoint_responds
testcase.failure: tests/test_controller_refactoring.py:42: in test_health_endpoint_responds assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 520 E assert 520 == 200 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_root_api_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 520 assert 520 in [200, 301, 302, 307, 308] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_controller_refactoring.py:116: in test_root_api_endpoint assert response.status_code in [200, 301, 302, 307, 308], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 520 E assert 520 in [200, 301, 302, 307, 308] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_invalid_endpoint_returns_404
testcase.failure: tests/test_controller_refactoring.py:194: in test_invalid_endpoint_returns_404 assert response.status_code == 404, f"Expected 404, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 404, got 520 E assert 520 == 404 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_malformed_request_handled_gracefully

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected error handling response, got 520 assert 520 in [400, 401, 403, 404, 422] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_controller_refactoring.py:205: in test_malformed_request_handled_gracefully assert response.status_code in [400, 401, 403, 404, 422], \ E AssertionError: Expected error handling response, got 520 E assert 520 in [400, 401, 403, 404, 422] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_swagger_docs_accessible

failure.message: AssertionError: Swagger docs inaccessible: 520 assert 520 in [200, 301, 302] + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_controller_refactoring.py:235: in test_swagger_docs_accessible assert response.status_code in [200, 301, 302], f"Swagger docs inaccessible: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Swagger docs inaccessible: 520 E assert 520 in [200, 301, 302] E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code
